message:
fix(rpc): replace hardcoded /tmp paths with t.TempDir() in tests

All ~80 instances of /tmp/test.sock, /tmp/test.jsonl, /tmp/test.db in
server_delete_test.go and server_mutations_test.go now use t.TempDir()
for proper test isolation and parallel execution safety.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
